hostname.title: LDAP Server Address
hostname.description: IP or domain of the LDAP server

port.title: LDAP Server Port
port.description: Port used to connect to the LDAP server

bindDN.title: Binding DN
bindDN.description: Distinguished Name of the user to connect as

bindPassword.title: Binding Password
bindPassword.description: Password of the user provided in the Binding DN field above

allowUnauthorizedCerts.title: Ignore SSL/TLS Issues
allowUnauthorizedCerts.description: Whether to connect even if SSL/TLS certificate validation is not possible
